files.content:
-- Module: Core1Let

square_plus :: Int -> Int -> Int
square_plus x y = (let xx = (x * x) in (xx + y))

clamp_min :: Int -> Int -> Int
clamp_min floor x = (let below = (x < floor) in (if below then floor else x))

payload.summary: Advances C1 backend completion by adding exact TypeScript and Haskell emitted-output snapshots for the existing Core1 let fixture. The patch wires snapshot comparison into the existing smoke test and stabilizes lexical let, nested if, comparison, and TypeScript IIFE emission without changing parser or checker semantics.
payload.title: Snapshot Core1 let backend output
